verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a Golgi-resident type-II transmembrane glycosyltransferase with its TM anchor and catalytic domain embedded in the trans-Golgi network. No documented surface cycling, shedding, cancer ecto-pool, cell-death externalization, developmental / germline restriction, or stable PM-partner tethering. Not a surface-directed therapeutic target. Canonical Golgi residence only.
